prompt:
A compact ultrasonic distance sensor module with two round transducers is wired to a few jumper leads on a breadboard, ready to plug into a microcontroller. The pins are labeled only by color with no text, and a small calibration target sits a short distance in front of the sensor. The setup is tidy and ESD-safe.

Depict a 512×512 photorealistic solarpunk lab bench with soft lighting, clean surfaces, and no logos or readable markings, keeping the focus on the ultrasonic module itself.
